results.rendered_html:
aśruta a.
1 Unheard, inaudible.
2 Contrary to the Vedas.
3 Not acquainted with the Śāstras, foolish, uneducated; bhāgaṃ vidyādhanāttasmāt sa labhetāśruto'pi san  Dāy. B.
